title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Explores how people's behavior and emotions influence financial decisions more than technical knowledge.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: Explains the two systems of thinking that drive our decisions: fast, intuitive thinking and slow, logical reasoning.

title: Think Again
author: Adam Grant
description: Encourages rethinking and unlearning outdated beliefs to improve decision-making and personal growth.

title: Talking to Strangers
author: Malcolm Gladwell
description: Examines how we misunderstand people we don't know and the consequences of these misjudgments.

title: Mindset
author: Carol S. Dweck
description: Introduces the concept of fixed and growth mindsets and how they impact success in life.

title: Designing Your Life
author: Bill Burnett & Dave Evans
description: Applies design thinking principles to help individuals build a meaningful and fulfilling life.

title: Company of One
author: Paul Jarvis
description: Promotes staying small in business and focusing on independence rather than growth at all costs.

title: Anything You Want
author: Derek Sivers
description: Shares lessons from building a successful business while staying true to personal values.

title: Show Your Work!
author: Austin Kleon
description: Encourages creators to share their process and build an audience by being open and authentic.

title: The Almanack of Naval Ravikant
author: Eric Jorgenson
description: A collection of wisdom and insights on wealth, happiness, and decision-making from Naval Ravikant.

title: Steal Like an Artist
author: Austin Kleon
description: A guide to creativity that encourages borrowing ideas and transforming them into something new.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through small daily improvements.
